title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapped path to $10M ARR in a case study covering strategy shifts from $0-$1M to $1M-$10M, approaches to reducing churn, product-led growth, pricing experiments, and decision-making frameworks for founder growth.
